description:
Product Information

Product Category: Abdominal Support Belt
Stage: Second trimester
Color: white, pink, black, shrimp
Specifications: S, L, M, XL, XXL

Reminder: The recommended size is for reference only, please buy it with the size you usually wear due to differences in your body.

Size Information
